description.ko: 유기적 식물과 디지털 건축의 교차점을 탐구하는 숨막히는 작품입니다. FLORA-9은 액체 금속 토양에서 자라나는 빛나는 데이터 스트림 꽃잎을 가진 홀로그램 꽃을 선보입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking exploration of the intersection between organic flora and digital architecture. FLORA-9 showcases holographic flowers with glowing data-stream petals growing from a bed of liquid metal soil.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a futuristic flower FLORA-9, translucent petals made of glowing digital grids and neon light fibers, intricate circuit patterns as leaf veins, blooming in a dark void with floating binary particles, 8k resolution, ethereal, cybernetic nature, bioluminescent aesthetic, macro photography.
